name: Microsoft Corporation
description: Microsoft Corporation ecosystem — suppliers, customers, partners, holdings, regulators, and macro risks.

nodes.name: Accenture
nodes.relationship: Provides Microsoft with strategic consulting for cloud services integration.

nodes.name: Foxconn
nodes.ticker: Foxconn parent company is Hon Hai Precision Industry
nodes.relationship: Manufactures and assembles Microsoft's hardware products.

nodes.name: Intel
nodes.relationship: Supplies processors for various Microsoft devices.

nodes.name: General Electric
nodes.relationship: Uses Microsoft Azure as a key platform for their cloud based applications and data analytics.

nodes.name: Walmart
nodes.relationship: selected Microsoft for using cloud solutions in its e-commerce operations.

nodes.name: AT&T
nodes.relationship: Partners with Microsoft on cloud service offerings for its business customers.

nodes.name: Salesforce
nodes.relationship: Strategic partnership to integrate services and enhance offering for their shared clients.

nodes.name: Nokia
nodes.relationship: Partnered to develop and produce internet services on Nokia's range of mobile devices.

nodes.name: SAP
nodes.relationship: Both companies cooperate on cloud services offerings and share development efforts.

nodes.name: Naspers
nodes.relationship: Holds significant shares in Tencent, which collaborates with Microsoft on various initiatives.

nodes.name: Altimeter Capital
nodes.ticker: Altimeter Capital is not publicly traded
nodes.relationship: Hedge fund that has taken a significant position in Microsoft shares.

nodes.name: European Commission
nodes.relationship: Enforces competition policies directly impacting Microsoft's operations in the EU.

nodes.name: United States Department of Justice
nodes.relationship: Has previously investigated Microsoft for antitrust practices and monitors their corporate behavior.

nodes.name: Global Cloud Infrastructure Spending
nodes.relationship: Directly influences Microsoft's Azure cloud business which is a significant revenue driver.

nodes.name: Regulations on Data Privacy
nodes.relationship: Affects the compliance costs and regulations faced by Microsoft’s cloud and data processing services.

nodes.name: Cybersecurity Threats
nodes.relationship: Impacts Microsoft's spend on security measures and product offerings, affecting cost and customer trust.
